title: Fix Known Bugs Before Testing
description: Fix 4 known bugs discovered during initial E2E testing: PORT env var ignored, config template missing fields, agent count display off-by-one, validate-init missing content checks.

dod.criterion: All 4 bugs fixed and npm run type-check passes

tasks.title: Fix server ignoring PORT env var
tasks.scope: server/config.ts loadConfig() reads port only from config.json. Add process.env.PORT check with precedence: env > config > default 4444.

dod.criterion: loadConfig() reads process.env.PORT and uses it when set, falling back to config.json then 4444
parseInt with NaN guard for non-numeric PORT values

tasks.title: Add preset and platform to gruai.config.json template
tasks.scope: Add preset and platform fields to gruai.config.json.template and update scaffoldGruaiConfig() to substitute them.

dod.criterion: gruai.config.json.template includes preset and platform with template placeholders

tasks.title: Fix scaffold console output showing agent count without CEO
tasks.scope: scaffold.ts and init.ts log agent count without CEO. Update to show N+1 or 'N agents + CEO' for consistency with registry.

dod.criterion: Console output shows total agent count including CEO or explicitly states 'N agents + CEO'
CEO entry NOT removed from registry

tasks.title: Add config content validation to validate-init.ts
tasks.scope: validate-init.ts only checks config file exists. Add assertions for preset, platform, and name fields.

dod.criterion: validate-init.ts asserts preset field matches input preset name
validate-init.ts asserts platform field matches input platform
